title: Horizon's Robots
description: It adds Robots from the Horizon game series into Minecraft.
body:
This mod adds Machines from the games Horizon: Zero Dawn, Forbidden West, and some of my own machine concepts into Minecraft.
This mod is for those who want machines with diverse attacks that require more strategy than the average mob.

**Not Tested with Multiplayer**

Despite its Initial release, the mod still has bugs to fix and a lot more updates to come.


### The Machines currently in the mod are


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Watcher: Small agile avian-like machines (Found: Everywhere)

Strider: Horse-like robots that roam in groups (Found: Everywhere)

Burrower: Mink-like machines capable of digging (Found: Deserts, Savannas, Jungles)

Grazers: Skitish grazing Deer-like machines (Found: Forests, Meadows, Hills)

Scrounger: Dog-like machines that scrap unused metal (Found: Deserts, Plains, Jungles)

Legdasher: Emu-like machines with powerful kicks (Found: Plains, Savannas)

Splasher: Agile Dolphin-like machines that juggle players around (Found: Salt and Fresh Water)

</details>





### Current Machine loot is


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Lens, Primary Nerves, and Hearts for each Machine

Wires that can replace string in most Recipes

Flash-Blinkers can be used for light-based Trinkets

Echoshells can be used for sound-based gadgets

Elemental Canisters for each Element

</details>






### Current Elements to Fear or Utilize

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Shock: Stuns the target in place and prevents them from doing anything

Ice: Increases the damage that the target receives

Fire: Deals damage over time to the target

Acid: Weakens the durability of anything in use by the Target

Purgewater: Makes the target inflict less Elemental status and weaker to Elemental status

Plasma: Unstable energy that builds up damage on the target and unleashes all built-up damage at the end of the timer

</details>

### Credits

Sounds are from Zapsplat and Pixabay

Models are created from Blockbench

TheDarkPeasant: Thanks for the assistance with the Splasher

Made with MCreator
